meta_desc: Discover the story of Hallucine, French manufacturer of inflatable cinema screens since 1995. Our passion, our know-how, our team.
hero_desc: Hallucine has been designing and manufacturing inflatable cinema screens, event tents and inflatable furniture for over 25 years. A family adventure born of a passion for cinema and outdoor projection.
daniel_intro: Over 25 years ago, I founded Hallucine. This is my story...
ch1_p1: One day, while reading a newspaper, I came across a small company that made 16mm projections. I was intrigued. Shortly afterwards, someone asked me for a projector for a 35mm film. I sold him one.
ch1_p2_after: . From then on, I went into the projection and cinema industry. And to go with the projectors, I needed screens. And so Hallucine was born. I was 36 years old.
ch2_p1_before: For over 25 years, I traveled to more than 30 countries to sell our screens:
ch2_p1_after: ... everywhere. I even took my children with me, from village to village.
ch2_p2: These years have been marked by precious moments spent together, like a family. We've met friends, forged bonds, shared joys and laughter.
ch2_p3: Hallucine is not just a traditional company. It's these moments of friendship and complicity that have shaped it. And it's this unique atmosphere that has kept me loyal to Hallucine for over 25 years.
cinema1_title: Unforgettable moments for the whole family
cinema1_p1: Hallucine is much more than just an inflatable screen. It's a catalyst for memories shared with friends and family. Our screens transform every screening or sporting event into a warm and memorable moment, where laughter, complicity and joy mingle.
cinema1_p2: Discover the joy of getting together to share jokes, bond with new friends or reconnect with loved ones over an immersive experience. With Hallucine, every event becomes an exceptional moment in life.
cinema2_title: Family and Company: A Shared History
cinema2_p1: Hallucine is much more than just a business: it's a book of memories written over time. Each installed screen bears witness to moments when family and friends, old and new, come together.
cinema2_p2: It's also a window on the evolution of generations, watching children grow up and adults blossom. Hallucine embodies family values, where work, laughter and memories come together to create unique and authentic experiences.
val1_desc: We use high-quality materials tested under the most demanding conditions. Each product is individually inspected before shipment.
val2_desc: Over 25 years' experience in inflatable design. Our team is with you from design to installation.
val3_desc: Rigorous quality controls at every stage of production. We make no compromises on quality, even for our economy range.
cta_desc: Contact us to discuss your project.
